untranslatable_reason: Signal requires VIX futures term structure data (Month1_Future, Month2_Future, contango spread) which are not available in the allowed indicator list. The india_vix indicator is a volatility index but does not directly represent VIX futures contract prices or their term structure slope. Specific contango threshold parameters and daily decay rate calculations cannot be expressed with available indicators.
translation_notes: This signal is inherently untranslatable because it requires: (1) VIX Month 1 futures price, (2) VIX Month 2 futures price, (3) calculation of the spread between them, and (4) comparison against thresholds for contango steepness and decay rates. None of these data inputs are available in the allowed indicator set. The signal also requires access to forward curve structure data that is not present in typical OHLCV price feeds.
